memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, FAccelByteMessagingSystem &InMessagingSystemRef, FAccelByteNetworkConditioner &InNetworkConditionerRef, TSharedPtr< AccelByte::FApiClient, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > const &InApiClient=nullptr, float InPingDelay=30.f, float InInitialBackoffDelay=1.f, float InMaxBackoffDelay=30.f, float InTotalTimeout=60.f)
memberdef.name: Chat

memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, FAccelByteMessagingSystem &InMessagingSystemRef, FAccelByteNetworkConditioner &InNetworkConditionerRef, FAccelBytePlatformPtr const &InAccelBytePlatform, float InPingDelay=30.f, float InInitialBackoffDelay=1.f, float InMaxBackoffDelay=30.f, float InTotalTimeout=60.f)
memberdef.name: Chat

briefdescription.para: delegate for handling response when refreshing chat token.
delegate for handling sent chat response.
delegate for handling chat topic query response.
delegate for handling chat topic query by id response.
delegate for handling public topic query response.
delegate for handling chat query response.
delegate for handling read chat response.
delegate for handling user block response.
delegate for handling user unblock response.
delegate for handling action chat topic response (create, update, delete, join, quit)
delegate for handling add user to topic and remove user from topic response.
delegate for handling delete system message(s) response.
delegate for handling update system message(s) response.
delegate for handling query system message response.

detaileddescription.para: Delegate for handling get system message stats response.
Delegate for handling get user chat configuration response.
Delegate for handling set user chat configuration response.

briefdescription.para: delegate for handling incoming chat notification.
delegate for handling read chat notification.
delegate for handling add to/ remove from topic notification.
delegate for handling chat topic removal/update notification.
delegate for handling chat incoming system messages.
Connect to the Chat server via websocket.

simplesect.para: You must connect to the server before you can start sending/receiving. Also make sure you have logged in first as this operation requires access token.

briefdescription.para: Disconnect from server if and only if the you have connected to server. If not currently connected, then this does nothing.

parameterdescription.para: boolean flag to forcefully cleanup the WebSocket connection

briefdescription.para: Check whether the websocket is currently connected to the Chat server.

simplesect.para: true if it's connected, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Check whether the websocket is currently trying to reconnect to the Chat server.

simplesect.para: true if it's connected, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Send and empty string through the web socket connection.
Delegate setter for chat websocket connection success event.

parameterdescription.para: Callback delegate when successfully connected to Chat Websocket.

briefdescription.para: Delegate setter for chat websocket connection failure event.

parameterdescription.para: Callback delegate when failed connecting to Chat Websocket.

briefdescription.para: Delegate setter for chat websocket disconnected event.

parameterdescription.para: Notification Delegate when disconnected from Chat Websocket.

briefdescription.para: Delegate setter for chat websocket connection closed event (connection closed by peer).

parameterdescription.para: Callback delegate when connection closed from Chat Websocket.

briefdescription.para: Get a multicast delegate that will be triggered when an attempt to reconnect websocket has been done.
Get a multicast delegate that will be triggered when connection is down & can't be reestablished. Longer than usual.
Refresh access token used in chat.

parameterdescription.para: new access token to be used in chat
delegate to be triggered when operation success
delegate to be triggered when operation error

simplesect.para: TBA

briefdescription.para: Unbind all delegates set previously.
Create a personal chat topic between logged in user and a TargetUserid (chat members == 2).

parameterdescription.para: - User id for 2nd member of the personal chat topic (1st member is self/logged in user)
- Callback for successful chat topic creation response
- Callback for failed chat topic creation

memberdef.argsstring: (TSet< FString > const &Users, TSet< FString > const &Admins, FString const &TopicName, bool bIsJoinable, FChatActionTopicResponse const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError=nullptr)
memberdef.name: CreateGroupTopic

briefdescription.para: Create a chat topic between multiple users (chat members > 2). Deprecated.

parameterdescription.para: - UserIds to be added to the chat topic, self/logged in user is automatically added as first user
- UserIds to be added to the chat topic as admin , self/logged in user is automatically added as admin
- Friendly name of the chat topic (alias)
- Whether new user can join this group topic without invitation from admin
- Callback for successful chat topic creation response
- Callback for failed chat topic creation

xrefdescription.para: Manual topic creation is deprecated - please use V2 Sessions to auto-create chat topics!

briefdescription.para: Create a chat topic between multiple users (chat members > 2). Deprecated.

parameterdescription.para: - Parameter request in struct form for creating a group topic
- Callback for successful chat topic creation response
- Callback for failed chat topic creation

xrefdescription.para: Manual topic creation is deprecated - please use V2 Sessions to auto-create chat topics!

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &TopicId, FString const &NewFriendlyTopicName, bool bIsJoinable, FChatActionTopicResponse const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError=nullptr)
memberdef.name: UpdateTopic

briefdescription.para: Update the topic information, only topic admin can use this operation.

parameterdescription.para: - To update topic id
- new alias for the topic id
- Whether new user can join this group topic without invitation from admin
- Callback for successful chat topic update response
- Callback for failed chat topic update

briefdescription.para: Update the topic information, only topic admin can use this operation.

parameterdescription.para: - Parameter request in struct form for updating a group topic
- Callback for successful chat topic update response
- Callback for failed chat topic update

briefdescription.para: Delete the group topic id, only topic admin can use this operation. PERSONAL topic cannot be deleted.

parameterdescription.para: - Group Topic id that will be deleted. PERSONAL topic cannot be deleted
- Callback for successful group chat topic deletion response
- Callback for failed chat topic deletion

briefdescription.para: Add a new user to an existing GROUP topic id, only topic admin can use this operation.

parameterdescription.para: - Parameter request in struct form for adding a user to a group topic
- Callback for successful chat topic user addition response
- Callback for failed chat topic user addition

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &TopicId, FString const &ToAddUserId, FAddRemoveUserFromTopicResponse const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError=nullptr)
memberdef.name: AddUserToTopic

briefdescription.para: Add an user to an existing topic id, only topic admin can use this operation.

parameterdescription.para: - Topic id that will receive the new user
- User Id that will be added to the topic
- Callback for successful chat topic user addition response
- Callback for failed chat topic user addition

briefdescription.para: Remove an user from an existing topic id, only topic admin can use this operation.

parameterdescription.para: - Parameter request in struct form for removing an existing member from a group topic
- Callback for successful chat topic user removal response
- Callback for failed chat topic user removal

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &TopicId, FString const &ToRemoveUserId, FAddRemoveUserFromTopicResponse const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError=nullptr)
memberdef.name: RemoveUserFromTopic

briefdescription.para: Remove an user from an existing topic id, only topic admin can use this operation.

parameterdescription.para: - Topic id that will remove an existing user
- User Id that will be removed from the topic
- Callback for successful chat topic user removal response
- Callback for failed chat topic user removal

briefdescription.para: Join a joinable group topic.

parameterdescription.para: - Joinable group topic id
- Callback for successful join
- Callback for failed join

briefdescription.para: Leave a group topic.

parameterdescription.para: - Group topic id that the logged in user is leaving
- Callback for successful quit
- Callback for failed quit

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &TopicId, FString const &Message, FSendChatResponse const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError=nullptr)
memberdef.name: SendChat

briefdescription.para: Create a personal chat topic between logged in user and a TargetUserid (chat members == 2).

parameterdescription.para: - a chat topic's topic id as chat destination
- Chat message to be send
- Callback for successful sent chat response
- Callback for failed sent chat

simplesect.para: CreatePersonalTopic, CreateGroupTopic, SetChatNotifDelegate, SetReadChatNotifDelegate

memberdef.argsstring: (TSet< FString > const &MessageIds, FDeleteSystemMessagesResponse const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError=nullptr)
memberdef.name: DeleteSystemMessages

briefdescription.para: Delete system message(s) in user system inbox.

parameterdescription.para: - Array of system message id
- Callback for successful deleted system message(s) in user system inbox
- Callback for failed deleted system message(s) in user system inbox

memberdef.argsstring: (TArray< FAccelByteModelsActionUpdateSystemMessage > const &ActionUpdateSystemMessages, FUpdateSystemMessagesResponse const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError=nullptr)
memberdef.name: UpdateSystemMessages

briefdescription.para: Update system message(s) in user system inbox.

parameterdescription.para: - Array of ActionUpdateSystemMessage containing action to mark read/unread and keep
- Callback for successful deleted system message(s) in user system inbox
- Callback for failed updated system message(s) in user system inbox

briefdescription.para: Query system messages in user's system inbox.

parameterdescription.para: - Callback for successful deleted system message(s) in user system inbox
- Callback for failed updated system message(s) in user system inbox
- Optional parameters for query inbox message

detaileddescription.para: Get system message stats (number of unread messages and date time of oldest unread message)

parameterdescription.para: - Callback for successful get system message stats
- Callback for failed get system message stats
- Optional request parameters

memberdef.argsstring: (int Offset, int Limit, FQueryTopicResponse const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError=nullptr)
memberdef.name: QueryPersonalTopic

briefdescription.para: Query PERSONAL chat topics that the logged in user is a member of.

detaileddescription.para: if user has sequential 100 topics, 1 is oldest, 100 is most recent result will be returned from most recent. so in this order: 100 - 1

parameterdescription.para: - Result offset from most recent. e.g. if user has 100 topics, offset 25 means result will start from 75
- Max count of returned results from the most recent e.g. if user has 100 topics, limit 20 will only return the last 20 (100-81)
- Callback for successful personal topic query response
- Callback for failed personal topic query

simplesect.para: QueryTopicById, QueryGroupTopic, QueryTopic, QueryPublicTopic, QueryChat

briefdescription.para: Query GROUP chat topics that the logged in user is a member of.

parameterdescription.para: - Parameter request in struct form
- Callback for successful personal topic query response
- Callback for failed personal topic query

simplesect.para: QueryTopicById, QueryPersonalTopic, QueryTopic, QueryChat

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Keyword, int Offset, int Limit, FQueryTopicResponse const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError=nullptr)
memberdef.name: QueryGroupTopic

briefdescription.para: Query GROUP chat topics that are subscribed by the logged in user.

detaileddescription.para: if user has sequential 100 topics, 1 is oldest, 100 is most recent result will be returned from most recent. so in this order: 100 - 1

parameterdescription.para: - Friendly name keyword for the topic, e.g. "gg guild"
- Result offset from most recent. e.g. if user has 100 topics, offset 25 means result will start from 75
- Max count of returned results from the most recent e.g. if user has 100 topics, limit 20 will only return the last 20 (100-81)
- Callback for successful group topic query response
- Callback for failed group topic query

simplesect.para: QueryTopicById, QueryGroupTopic, QueryPersonalTopic, QueryPublicTopic, QueryChat

briefdescription.para: Query chat topics (PERSONAL and GROUP, excluding PUBLIC) that are subscribed by the logged in user.

parameterdescription.para: - Parameter request in struct form
- Callback for successful topic query response
- Callback for failed topic query

simplesect.para: QueryTopicById, QueryGroupTopic, QueryPersonalTopic, QueryPublicTopic, QueryChat

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Keyword, int Offset, int Limit, FQueryTopicResponse const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError=nullptr)
memberdef.name: QueryTopic

briefdescription.para: Query chat topics (PERSONAL and GROUP, excluding PUBLIC) that are subscribed by the logged in user.

detaileddescription.para: if user has sequential 100 topics, 1 is oldest, 100 is most recent result will be returned from most recent. so in this order: 100 - 1

parameterdescription.para: Friendly name keyword for the topic, only relevant for topic topic and not personal topic e.g. "gg guild"
- Result offset from most recent. e.g. if user has 100 topics, offset 25 means result will start from 75
- Max count of returned results from the most recent e.g. if user has 100 topics, limit 20 will only return the last 20 (100-81)
- Callback for successful topic query response
- Callback for failed topic query

simplesect.para: QueryTopicById, QueryGroupTopic, QueryPersonalTopic, QueryPublicTopic, QueryChat

briefdescription.para: Query chat topics (PERSONAL and GROUP, excluding PUBLIC) that are subscribed by the logged in user By using Id as keyword instead of group name.

parameterdescription.para: - Parameter request in struct form
- Callback for successful topic query response
- Callback for failed topic query

simplesect.para: QueryGroupTopic, QueryPersonalTopic, QueryPublicTopic, QueryChat

briefdescription.para: Query PUBLIC (joinable) chat topics (server topic / channel).

parameterdescription.para: - Parameter request in struct form
- Callback for successful topic query response
- Callback for failed topic query

simplesect.para: QueryTopicById, QueryGroupTopic, QueryPersonalTopic, QueryTopic, QueryChat

briefdescription.para: Query chat messages that are subscribed by the logged in user.

parameterdescription.para: - Callback for successful topic query response
- Callback for failed topic query

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &TopicId, int Limit, FQueryChatResponse const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError=nullptr)
memberdef.name: QueryChat

briefdescription.para: Query chat messages that are subscribed by the logged in user.

parameterdescription.para: - target topic from which the chats are being queried
- max count of returned results from the most recent
- Callback for successful topic query response
- Callback for failed topic query

memberdef.argsstring: (TSet< FString > const &ChatIds, FReadChatResponse const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError=nullptr)

briefdescription.para: Flag the supplied ChatIds as has been read.

parameterdescription.para: - Chat message Ids to mark as has been read
- Callback for successful topic query response
- Callback for failed topic query

briefdescription.para: Block user from chatting.

parameterdescription.para: - User ID to block
- Callback for successful block user response
- Callback for failed block user

briefdescription.para: Unblock user from chatting.

parameterdescription.para: - User ID to unblock
- Callback for successful block user response
- Callback for failed Unblock user

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GroupId, FString const &ChatId, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: DeleteGroupChat

briefdescription.para: Delete a message from group chat (used by group moderator).

parameterdescription.para: Id of group from group service.
Id of message to delete.
Called when the operation succeeded.
Called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GroupId, FString const &UserId, int32 DurationInSeconds, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)

briefdescription.para: Mute user from group chat (used by group moderator).

parameterdescription.para: Id of group from group service.
Id of the user to be muted.
Duration of mute in seconds.
Called when the operation succeeded.
Called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GroupId, FString const &UserId, FVoidHandler const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UnmuteGroupUserChat

briefdescription.para: Unmute user from group chat (used by group moderator).

parameterdescription.para: Id of group from group service.
Id of the user to be un-muted.
Called when the operation succeeded.
Called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GroupId, FString const &ChatId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsChatSnapshotResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)

briefdescription.para: Get chat snapshot (used by group moderator).

parameterdescription.para: Id of group from group service.
Id of message.
Called when the operation succeeded.
Called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GroupId, TArray< FString > const &UserIds, THandler< FAccelByteModelsBanGroupChatResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)

briefdescription.para: Ban users from group chat (used by group moderator).

parameterdescription.para: Id of group from group service.
Array of user ids to ban.
Called when the operation succeeded.
Called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &GroupId, TArray< FString > const &UserIds, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUnbanGroupChatResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UnbanGroupUserChat

briefdescription.para: Unban users from group chat (used by group moderator).

parameterdescription.para: Id of group from group service.
Array of user ids to unban.
Called when the operation succeeded.
Called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Get chat configuration for current user.

parameterdescription.para: - Callback for successful get user chat configuration.
- Callback for failed get user chat configuration.

briefdescription.para: Set chat configuration for current user.

parameterdescription.para: - The chat configuration.
- Callback for successful set user chat configuration.
- Callback for failed set user chat configuration.

briefdescription.para: Delegate setter for incoming chat message event.
Delegate setter for logged in user added to a topic event.
Delegate setter for logged in user removed from a topic event.
Delegate setter for when a subscribed topic is deleted.
Delegate setter for when a subscribed topic is updated.
Delegate setter for when a subscribed topic's chat has been read by others.
Delegate setter for when user received ban event.
Delegate setter for when user received a System message.
Delegate setter for when user received unban event.
Delegate setter for when user received muted event.
Delegate setter for when user received unmuted event.
Get chat config of a namespace.

parameterdescription.para: Called when the operation succeeded.
Called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

briefdescription.para: Generate group topic id based on group id.

parameterdescription.para: Id of the Group

simplesect.para: Group topic id

briefdescription.para: Chat API for chatting between users Unlike other servers which use HTTP, Chat server uses WebSocket (RFC 6455).

detaileddescription.para:
This chat service features more functionality/capacity than the conventional chat in Lobby API
Chat service enables user to send message to other user / group of user. We use topic as wrapper for chat connection. Topic can have two different types:
Personal Topic for bidirectional chat between one user to other user (==2)
Group Topic for chat between multiple user (>2) a. Can be public (join able) and private (not joinable)
public : user can join by knowing topic id
private: only admin can add or remove member
